title: baccharis rupicola subsp. summapacis
intro: Baccharis rupicola subsp. summapacis is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, commonly known as the rock baccharis or summa pacis baccharis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The Baccharis rupicola subsp. summapacis plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
